item.spells_n_gods.rune.tooltip: A divine sigil, etched with the will of the gods.
spells_n_gods.locator.desc.deus: A warm golden relic that hums with radiant faith, ever drawn toward the light of creation.
spells_n_gods.locator.desc.velox: A crackling shard of crystallized lightning, restless and eager to find the storm's heart.
spells_n_gods.locator.desc.celia: A pendulum of dark glass that swings unbidden, pulled by the scent of old blood.
spells_n_gods.locator.desc.bella: A smouldering coal that refuses to die, burning brightest when war drums echo near.
spells_n_gods.locator.desc.bricoleur: An unblinking eye of pale stone, forever gazing toward truths yet unspoken.
spells_n_gods.locator.desc.ingenium: A lens ground from the edge of nothing, through which the fabric of the world bends.
spells_n_gods.locator.desc.venatas: A yellowed fang that trembles in the hand, as though it still remembers the chase.
spells_n_gods.locator.desc.magnus: A lodestone that defies nature, drawn not north but toward forbidden knowing.
spells_n_gods.locator.desc.glacia: A teardrop of eternal ice that will not melt, cold with the silence of an endless winter.
spells_n_gods.locator.none_found: No god temples have been discovered in this dimension.
spells_n_gods.locator.none_found_god: No temple of %s has been discovered in this dimension.
spells_n_gods.locator.tooltip: Reveals the location of the nearest god temple.
spells_n_gods.locator.tooltip.god: Use to divine the path to %s's temple.
spells_n_gods.monument.tooltip: A sacred altar of worship and devotion.
spells_n_gods.monument.tooltip2: Place and interact to pray to your chosen god.
spells_n_gods.ruined_idol.tooltip: A desecrated monument, scarred by apostasy.
god.spells_n_gods.deus.desc: Through faith, all things are made whole.
god.spells_n_gods.deus.title: The Architect
god.spells_n_gods.velox.title: The Messenger
god.spells_n_gods.celia.desc: Power is paid in blood; the stronger the will, the deeper the cut.
god.spells_n_gods.celia.title: The Alchemist
god.spells_n_gods.bella.desc: Only through battle is greatness forged.
god.spells_n_gods.bella.title: The Warrior
god.spells_n_gods.bricoleur.desc: The unseen hand shapes every fate.
god.spells_n_gods.bricoleur.title: The Prophet
god.spells_n_gods.ingenium.desc: Beyond the veil, all truths converge.
god.spells_n_gods.ingenium.title: The Genius
god.spells_n_gods.venatas.desc: The wild does not forgive; it endures.
god.spells_n_gods.venatas.title: The Hunter
god.spells_n_gods.magnus.title: The Mage
god.spells_n_gods.glacia.desc: In silence and frost, perfection crystallizes.
god.spells_n_gods.glacia.title: The Snowflake
spells_n_gods.binding.success: You have bound yourself to %s. May their blessings guide you.
spells_n_gods.error.rune_not_bound: This rune is not bound to any god.
spells_n_gods.error.no_valid_position: Cannot find a valid position for the monument.
spells_n_gods.error.already_bound: You are already bound to a god. Apostasy is required to change allegiance.
spells_n_gods.error.apostasy_cooldown: You must wait %s more hours before binding to a new god.
spells_n_gods.monument.not_owner: This monument does not belong to you.
spells_n_gods.monument.wrong_god: This monument is not dedicated to your god.
spells_n_gods.prayer.complete: Your prayer to %s has been heard. Favor gained.
spells_n_gods.prayer.too_far: You moved too far from the monument. Prayer interrupted.
spells_n_gods.prayer.on_cooldown: You must wait %s seconds before praying again.
spells_n_gods.prayer.not_bound: You must be bound to a god to pray.
spells_n_gods.prayer.unknown_god: Your god's definition is missing from the datapack.
spells_n_gods.offering.error: An error occurred processing the offering.
spells_n_gods.offering.not_bound: You must be bound to a god to make offerings.
spells_n_gods.offering.unknown_god: Your god's definition is missing from the datapack.
spells_n_gods.offering.accepted: %s has accepted your offering. Favor gained.
spells_n_gods.offering.must_be_crafted: This offering must be crafted by you.
spells_n_gods.offering.rarity_too_low: This offering is not rare enough.
spells_n_gods.offering.denied_item: This item cannot be offered to your god.
spells_n_gods.offering.not_allowed: Your god does not accept this kind of offering.
spells_n_gods.offering.requires_replant: Offer this only after tending and replanting the land.
spells_n_gods.offering.requires_trade_cy: Complete a trade before making this offering.
spells_n_gods.offering.requires_risk: This offering demands a recent act of daring.
spells_n_gods.offering.requires_kill_cre: Only the spoils of your own kills may be offered.
spells_n_gods.offering.requires_mana_spe: Spend your magic before offering this.
spells_n_gods.offering.requires_timer: You must wait at least %s seconds between such offerings.
spells_n_gods.ruined_idol.message: This monument has been desecrated. Only dust and regret remain.
spells_n_gods.ruined_idol.abandoned: This was once a monument to %s. Now it is nothing.
spells_n_gods.apostasy.disabled: Apostasy is not allowed on this server.
spells_n_gods.apostasy.not_bound: You are not bound to any god.
spells_n_gods.apostasy.already_in_trial: You are already undergoing apostasy trials.
spells_n_gods.apostasy.wrong_monument: This monument is not dedicated to your god.
spells_n_gods.apostasy.trial_starting: You have begun the rites of apostasy. Prepare to face divine judgment.
spells_n_gods.apostasy.trial_started: The trials have begun. Survive, and you will be free.
spells_n_gods.apostasy.no_god: Cannot complete apostasy - no god to abandon.
spells_n_gods.apostasy.completed: You have abandoned %s. Their curse now weighs upon you.
spells_n_gods.apostasy.trial_failed: You have failed the trials. %s's wrath marks you forever.
spells_n_gods.trial.phase1.start: Phase 1: Marked for Wrath. All eyes are upon you for %s seconds.
spells_n_gods.trial.phase2.start: Phase 2: Divine Pursuit. Survive the hunters for %s seconds.
spells_n_gods.trial.phase3.start: Phase 3: Final Judgment. Defeat the champion or endure for %s seconds.
spells_n_gods.trial.phase_complete: You have survived this trial. The next begins.
spells_n_gods.trial.complete: You have passed the trials. The bond is severed.
spells_n_gods.scar.notification: A permanent scar marks your soul. You now bear %s scars.
spells_n_gods.curse.active: A latent curse afflicts you for the next %s hours.
spells_n_gods.curse.cleared: The latent curse has been lifted.
spells_n_gods.curse.expired: The latent curse has finally faded.
spells_n_gods.curse.deus: The Architect's Grief - your constructs crumble and light forsakes you.
spells_n_gods.curse.velox: Storm's Shackle - the winds turn against you, your steps grow heavy.
spells_n_gods.curse.celia: Blood Price - your veins rebel, sapping your vitality.
spells_n_gods.curse.bella: Warrior's Shame - fire no longer answers your call, your strikes falter.
spells_n_gods.curse.bricoleur: Prophet's Silence - the unseen hand withdraws its guidance.
spells_n_gods.curse.ingenium: Void's Rejection - the fabric of space resists your passage.
spells_n_gods.curse.venatas: Nature's Exile - the wild turns hostile, beasts sense your betrayal.
spells_n_gods.curse.magnus: Eldritch Unraveling - forbidden knowledge claws at your sanity.
spells_n_gods.curse.glacia: Frostbitten Soul - a chill that no fire can warm seeps into your bones.
spells_n_gods.fragment.tooltip: A fragment of divine power, resonating with runic energy.
spells_n_gods.boss.name: %s
spells_n_gods.structure.protected: This structure is protected by divine power.
spells_n_gods.command.boss.respawn_all: Forced respawn of all dead bosses.
